players.name: players
players.description: Show online players on the HumanitZ server

reply.fetch_failed: ❌ Could not fetch player list. The server may be offline.

playerstats.name: playerstats
playerstats.description: View player activity stats (deaths, builds, raids, etc.)

menus.player_placeholder: Select a player to view their stats…

reply.no_data: No player stats recorded yet. Stats are gathered from the game server log — play for a while and check back!

playtime.name: playtime
playtime.description: Show playtime leaderboard or look up a player

options.player: Player name to look up (leave empty for leaderboard)

server.name: server
server.description: Show server info, world state, and difficulty schedule

reply.unreachable: ❌ Could not reach the server. It may be offline or RCON is unavailable.

rcon.name: rcon
rcon.description: Send a raw RCON command to the server (Admin only)

reply.blocked: ❌ The command `{{command}}` is blocked for safety. Use the server panel to perform this action.

qspanel.name: qspanel
qspanel.description: Server admin panel — power, console, backups, status (Admin only)

subcommands.status: Server power state, resources, and host details
subcommands.kill: Force-kill the game server process (emergency only)
subcommands.console: Send a console command via the hosting panel
subcommands.backup_delete: Delete a server backup by its UUID

reply.panel_api_not_configured: ❌ Panel API is not configured. Set `PANEL_SERVER_URL` and `PANEL_API_KEY` in your `.env` file.
reply.power_signal_sent:
Power signal `{{signal}}` sent successfully.
The server may take a moment to respond.
reply.panel_console_note: *Note: Panel console is fire-and-forget — no response is returned. Use `/rcon` for commands that need a response.*
reply.backup_created_body:
**{{name}}**
UUID: `{{uuid}}`

The backup is being created. It may take a few minutes to complete.
reply.backup_limit_reached: ❌ Backup limit reached. Delete an existing backup first, or upgrade your plan.
reply.schedules_none:
No schedules configured.
Use your hosting panel to create schedules (auto-restart, backups, etc.).

threads.name: threads
threads.description: Rebuild daily activity summary threads from log history (Admin only)

options.days: How many days back to rebuild (default: all)

reply.no_events: ℹ️ No events found for the requested date range.
reply.chat_note: 💬 *Chat threads are built from live RCON polling — historic chat can be replayed from the DB using `/threads source:db`.*
